parameters: Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at bonfires)

You need a torch to light a bonfire (Make one at the
workbench)

You can now take a shortcut to the first floor of the
tower.

It seems like it can be destroyed if you have a bronze
pickaxe or better.

I don't have an iron pickaxe... Let's make one at the
workbench.

Succubus Hehehe... Want to see a fun dream? (＊Be
careful as there's an H-event that breaks the
